If this deploy is correct, an Alloe-style chat pill appears (bottom-center).

The script uses a content-hashed filename (e.g. /chat-widget.8bffd4aa99cc.js) so caches cannot replay an old wrong body for a fixed /chat-widget.js URL. It is parser-inserted like production embeds.

Paths are root-absolute. Unregister any service worker for this site if the script body is wrong.

Loading widget script…

Sending messages needs your chat API at apiBaseUrl (and CORS).
